title: Dorcupi's Cursed Item Collection
description: A collection of many cursed Minecraft items for your enjoyment.
body:
![Cursed Item Collection Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30ecf5f5c204a24585ec4c53e242a57ca5539148.png)

The Cursed Item Collection is an updating datapack filled with weird cursed and uncanny items that shouldn't be in Minecraft that I have coded in. The best part is that some of the items are actually useful! While the rest are complete trolls with no purpose.

There are currently 12 items with more items coming out in "drops" (batches) of 3-7 coinciding with videos published on my YouTube channel.

For more information about each item, including how to craft them, a wiki is available [here](https://dvy.notion.site/Dorcupi-s-Cursed-Item-Collection-0e4b6c4d8a124563acb6edff4340be42).


<details>
<summary>Current Drops</summary>

## Current Drops

![GIF of items in Drop One](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5266bde0f3c8128f85b200f6544610f5249241d.gif)
![GIF of items in Drop Two](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df276742e5822db4854eb93fdb116c6856636124.gif)
![GIF of items in Drop Three](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c32c0247c77df175e270313ca008ad3f6e43715d.gif)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Current Items</summary>

## Current Items

- Meat Pickaxe: a pickaxe that can be eaten, as good as a Wooden Pickaxe
- Dynamite: throwable TNT
- Diamond Pickaxe Pickaxe Pickaxe: the power of four Diamond Pickaxes into one.
- Broken Bucket: a bucket that spills the contents on you immediately.
- Black Hole: guerilla destruction in one item.
- Bedrock Apple: edible death.
- Ender Pearl Armor: a suit to transform into an Enderman.
  - Ender Pearl Helmet: be peaceful with other Endermen.
  - Ender Pearl Leggings: become the size of an Enderman.
  - Ender Pearl Boots: teleport randomly with the slightest movement.
- Meat Armor: edible armor that slowly rots.
- Dirt Armor: early game armor that breaks extremely easily.
- Stone Armor: extremely strong armor that weighs down anyone who wears it.
- TNT Armor: TNT in the form of armor. Explodes with any heat.
- Cursed Crate: a crate that drops random cursed items.
- More to come!
</details>
